memoryArtifacts.headline: Toddington Manor
memoryArtifacts.description: Toddington Manor is a 19th century country house in the English county of Gloucestershire, near the village of Toddington. It is in the gothic style and was designed by Charles Hanbury-Tracy, 1st Baron Sudeley for himself and built between 1819 and 1840.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Tracy於大約1431年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓時，他的父親Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff32歲，母親Margaret Pauncefort27歲。他於1458年與Alice Baldington在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國格盧斯特斯爾被列為high sheriff of gloucester。他去世於1501年6月30日在他的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Tracy于大约1431年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓时，他的父亲Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff32岁，母亲Margaret Pauncefort27岁。他于1458年与Alice Baldington在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在英国格盧斯特斯爾被列为high sheriff of gloucester。他去世于1501年6月30日在他的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Tracy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

variants.name: Tracey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tracy‐Bocage or Tracy‐sur‐Mer (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Tracy was born about 1431, in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Pauncefort, was 27. He married Alice Baldington in 1458, in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as high sheriff of gloucester in Gloucestershire, England. He died on 30 June 1501, in his hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Hailes Abbey, Toddingham, Gloucester, En: Hailes Abbey, Hailes, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Tracy est né environ 1431, à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Pauncefort, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Alice Baldington en 1458, à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of gloucester à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 30 juin 1501, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Hailes Abbey, Toddingham, Gloucester, En: Hailes Abbey, Hailes, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Tracy um 1431 in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff 32 und seine Mutter Margaret Pauncefort 27. Er hat 1458 in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Alice Baldington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als high sheriff of gloucester in Gloucestershire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. Juni 1501 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Tracy è nato il circa 1431 nel Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Pauncefort, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Alice Baldington nel 1458, nel Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of gloucester nel Gloucestershire, England. Morì il 30 giugno 1501, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Tracyが約1431年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトッドイントンで生まれた時，父Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriffは32歳，母Margaret Pauncefortは27歳であった。1458年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトッドイントンでAlice Baldingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでの職業はhigh sheriff of gloucesterと記録されている。彼は1501年6月30日に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.Hailes Abbey, Toddingham, Gloucester, En: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 하일레스 하일레스 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Tracy(이)가 대략 1431년 영국 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Pauncefort(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1458년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에서 Alice Baldington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 그루스스터실르에서 high sheriff of gloucester이었다. 그는 1501년 6월 30일 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에 묻혔다.

pt.Hailes Abbey, Toddingham, Gloucester, En: Hailes Abbey, Hailes, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Tracy nasceu aproximadamente 1431, em Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Pauncefort, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Baldington em 1458, em Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of gloucester em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 30 de junho de 1501, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Hailes Abbey, Toddingham, Gloucester, En: Hailes Abbey, Hailes, Gloucestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Hailes Abbey, Toddingham, Gloucester, En: хеилесь эбби, хеилесь, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Tracy родился около 1431 г. в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Pauncefort, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Baldington в 1458 г. в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии high sheriff of gloucester в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. Он умер 30 июня 1501 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Hailes Abbey, Toddingham, Gloucester, En: Hailes Abbey, Hailes, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Tracy nació aproximadamente 1431, en Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Pauncefort, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Alice Baldington en 1458, en Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of gloucester en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Murió el 30 de junio de 1501, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
